security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com; media-src 'self' mediastream:

bundle.shortDescription: A voice-native interface layer designed for speed and precision
bundle.longDescription: VOCO is a Linux desktop dictation tool built for low-friction voice capture, local-first speech processing, and fast insertion into the app you are already using. It stays lightweight in the tray, guides microphone setup on first launch, and keeps Linux-specific behavior explicit instead of hiding platform constraints.
